p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion from tx.fhir.org based on SNOMED CT International edition 01-Feb 2025
This value set contains 2 concepts

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Adherence Status Reason v1.1.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 7 concepts

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Medication Line Adherence Status v1.1.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 11 concepts

tr.td: The medication is being taken as directed.
The medication is not being taken as directed.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationLineAdherenceStatus"><version value="1.1.0"><code value="taking-not-as-directed"><display value="Taking Not As Directed"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The medication is not being taken.
The medication is on hold as directed.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationLineAdherenceStatus"><version value="1.1.0"><code value="on-hold-as-directed"><display value="On Hold As Directed"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The medication is on hold not as directed.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationLineAdherenceStatus"><version value="1.1.0"><code value="on-hold-not-as-directed"><display value="On Hold Not As Directed"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The medication is stopped as directed.
The medication is stopped not as directed.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationLineAdherenceStatus"><version value="1.1.0"><code value="stopped-not-as-directed"><display value="Stopped Not As Directed"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Whether the medication is being taken or not is not currently known.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Medication origin Type v1.1.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 6 concepts

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationLineOriginType"><version value="1.1.0"><code value="self-medication"><display value="Upon patient demand - Self-medication"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Medication not sold in Belgium, with prescription

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationLineOriginType", "version": "1.1.0", "code": "with-request", "display": "Medication not sold in Belgium, with prescription"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationLineOriginType"><version value="1.1.0"><code value="with-request"><display value="Medication not sold in Belgium, with prescription"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Medication not sold in Belgium, without prescription

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationLineOriginType", "version": "1.1.0", "code": "without-request", "display": "Medication not sold in Belgium, without prescription"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationLineOriginType"><version value="1.1.0"><code value="without-request"><display value="Medication not sold in Belgium, without prescription"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

display.value: Medication not sold in Belgium, with prescription
Medication not sold in Belgium, without prescription

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Medication Line Registration Status v1.1.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 3 concepts

title.value: Medication Line Registration Status Value Set

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem MedicationRequest Status Codes v5.0.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 5 concepts

tr.td: The request is 'actionable', but not all actions that are implied by it have occurred yet.
All actions that are implied by the request have occurred.
The request has been withdrawn before any administrations have occurred
Actions implied by the request are to be permanently halted, before all of the administrations occurred. This should not be used if the original order was entered in error

The request was recorded against the wrong patient or for some reason should not have been recorded (e.g. wrong medication, wrong dose, etc.). Some of the actions that are implied by the medication request may have occurred. For example, the medication may have been dispensed and the patient may have taken some of the medication.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Medication request reimbursement type v1.1.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 9 concepts

tr.td: Second dose + [date of the first dose]

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationRequestReimbursementType"><version value="1.1.0"><code value="second-dose"><display value="Second dose + [date of the first dose]"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Third dose + [date of the first and second dose]

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationRequestReimbursementType", "version": "1.1.0", "code": "third-dose", "display": "Third dose + [date of the first and second dose]"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationRequestReimbursementType"><version value="1.1.0"><code value="third-dose"><display value="Third dose + [date of the first and second dose]"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/terminology/CodeSystem/BeMedicationRequestReimbursementType"><version value="1.1.0"><code value="chronic-renal-failure-pathway"><display value="Care pathway chronic renal failure"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

display.value: Second dose + [date of the first dose]
Third dose + [date of the first and second dose]

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem BeCdHcParty v2.1.2 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 7 concepts

tr.td: pharmacy service or department within an organisation

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/core/CodeSystem/cd-hcparty", "version": "2.1.2", "code": "deptpharmacy", "display": "pharmacy service or department within an organisation"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://www.ehealth.fgov.be/standards/fhir/core/CodeSystem/cd-hcparty"><version value="2.1.2"><code value="deptpharmacy"><display value="pharmacy service or department within an organisation"></coding>

display.value: pharmacy service or department within an organisation
